tests_added: tests/test_cutpoint_token_padding.py::TokenPaddingAgentATests covers fixture loading, unknown selected IDs, token sorting across merged ranges, invalid token filtering, token padding, segment fallback padding, merge-gap behavior, media clamp, and metadata preservation.
notes: Implemented deterministic token_padding behavior for selected transcript segments. The strategy uses the earliest valid token start and latest valid token end across each merged selected range, applies default pre/post padding, clamps to duration_ms when present, preserves source_segment_ids/adjustment_reason/confidence, and raises on unknown selected_segment_ids. Fallback is segment boundary padding when a selected range has no valid tokens. This baseline does not inspect audio, RMS, or VAD, so natural silence or breath-point snapping remains for agents B/C.
